sunnah_ref_en: Ibn 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "I have been commanded to fight people till they testify 'La ilaha illallah' (there is no true god except Allah) that Muhammad (ﷺ) is his slave and Messenger, and they establish Salat, and pay Zakat; and if they do this, their blood (life) and property are secured except when justified by law, and it is for Allah to call them to account.".
iwh_en: Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "I have been commanded to fight people till they testify 'La ilaha illallah' (there is no true god except Allah) that Muhammad (ﷺ) is his slave and Messenger, and they establish Salat, and pay Zakat; and if they do this, their blood (life) and property are secured except when justified by law, and it is for Allah to call them to account.".
iwh_id: Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "I have been memerintahkan to fight orang-orang till they testify 'La ilaha illallah' (there is no true god except Allah) that Muhammad (ﷺ) is his slave and Messenger, dan mereka establish Salat, and pay Zakat; dan if they do this, their blood (life) and property are secured except when justified by law, and it is for Allah to call them to account.".

ar:
عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه، قال‏:‏ لما توفي رسول الله، وكان أبو بكر، رضي الله عنه، وكفر من كفر من العرب، فقال عمر رضي الله عنه‏:‏ كيف يقاتل الناس وقد قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏
"‏أمرت أن أقاتل الناس حتى يقولوا لا إله إلا الله، فمن قالها، فقد عصم مني ماله ونفسه إلا بحقه وحسابه على الله‏"‏ ‏؟‏‏!‏ فقال أبو بكر‏:‏ والله لأقاتلن من فرق بين الصلاة والزكاة، فإن الزكاة حق المال‏.‏ والله لو منعوني عقال كانوا يؤدونه إلى رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم، لقاتلتهم على منعه، قال‏:‏ عمر رضي الله عنه‏:‏ فوالله ما هو إلا أن رأيت الله قد شرح صدر أبي بكر للقتال، فعرفت أنه الحق‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏ ‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: When the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) passed away, Abu Bakr (May Allah be pleased with him) was appointed as his successor (caliph). Amongst the Arabs some men apostatised. Abu Bakr (May Allah be pleased with him) resolved to fight them. 'Umar bin Al-Khattab (May Allah be pleased with him) said to Abu Bakr: "How can you fight them when the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) has declared: 'I have been commanded to fight people till they testify La ilaha illallah (there is no true god except Allah); and if they do it, their blood (life) and property are secured except when justified by law, and it is for Allah to call them to account." Upon this Abu Bakr (May Allah be pleased with him) said: "By Allah, I would definitely fight him who makes distinction between Salat and the Zakat, because it is an obligation upon the rich to pay Zakat. By Allah I will fight them even to secure the piece of rope which they used to give to the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ)." 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with him) said: "I realized that Allah opened the heart of Abu Bakr (May Allah be pleased with him) for fighting those who refused to pay Zakat, and I fully recognized that Abu Bakr

Upon this Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: "By Allah, I would definitely fight him who makes distinction antara Salat dan the Zakat, because it is an obligation upon the rich to pay Zakat. By Allah I will fight them even to secure the piece of rope which they biasa memberikan to Rasulullah ﷺ." ar:
وعن أبي أيوب رضي الله عنه، أن رجلا قال للنبي صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ أخبرني بعمل يدخلني الجنة قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏تعبد الله لا تشرك به شيئًا، وتقيم الصلاة، وتؤتي الزكاة، وتصل الرحم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏ ‏.‏
ar_clean:
وعن أبي أيوب رضي الله عنه، أن رجلا قال للنبي صلى الله عليه وسلم : أخبرني بعمل يدخلني الجنة قال: 
"تعبد الله لا تشرك به شيئًا، وتقيم الصلاة، وتؤتي الزكاة، وتصل الرحم" ((متفق عليه)) .
isnad_ar: وعن أبي أيوب رضي الله عنه

"تعبد الله لا تشرك به شيئًا، وتقيم الصلاة، وتؤتي الزكاة، وتصل الرحم" ((متفق عليه)) .
matn_ar_clean:
أن رجلا قال للنبي صلى الله عليه وسلم : أخبرني بعمل يدخلني الجنة قال: 
"تعبد الله لا تشرك به شيئا، وتقيم الصلاة، وتؤتي الزكاة، وتصل الرحم" ((متفق عليه)) .
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Ayyub (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: A man said to the Prophet (ﷺ): "Direct me to a deed which may admit me to Jannah." Upon this he (the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ)) said, "Worship Allah and never associate anything with Him in worship, establish Salat, pay Zakat, and strengthen the ties of kinship.".
iwh_en: Abu Ayyub (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a man said to the Prophet ﷺ: "Direct me to a deed which may admit me to Jannah." Upon this he (the Messenger of Allah ﷺ) said, "Worship Allah and never associate anything with Him in worship, establish Salat, pay Zakat, and strengthen the ties of kinship.".
iwh_id: Abu Ayyub (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa seorang laki-laki berkata to Nabi ﷺ: "Direct me to a deed which may admit me to Jannah." Upon this he (Rasulullah ﷺ) berkata, "Worship Allah dan never associate anything with Him in worship, establish Salat, pay Zakat, and strengthen the ties of kinship.".

ar: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه، أن أعرابيًا أتي النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال‏:‏ يا رسول الله دلني على عمل إذا عملته، دخلت الجنة‏.‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏تعبد الله ولا تشرك به شيئًا، وتقيم الصلاة، وتؤتي الزكاة المفروضة، وتصوم رمضان‏"‏ قال‏:‏ والذي نفسي بيده، لا أزيد على هذا‏.‏ فلما ولى قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏"‏من سره أن ينظر إلى رجل من أهل الجنة فلينظر إلى هذا‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏ ‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه، أن أعرابيًا أتي النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال: يا رسول الله دلني على عمل إذا عملته، دخلت الجنة. قال: "تعبد الله ولا تشرك به شيئًا، وتقيم الصلاة، وتؤتي الزكاة المفروضة، وتصوم رمضان" قال: والذي نفسي بيده، لا أزيد على هذا. فلما ولى قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم : "من سره أن ينظر إلى رجل من أهل الجنة فلينظر إلى هذا" ((متفق عليه)) .
isnad_ar: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه
matn_ar: أن أعرابيًا أتي النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال: يا رسول الله دلني على عمل إذا عملته، دخلت الجنة. قال: "تعبد الله ولا تشرك به شيئًا، وتقيم الصلاة، وتؤتي الزكاة المفروضة، وتصوم رمضان" قال: والذي نفسي بيده، لا أزيد على هذا. فلما ولى قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم : "من سره أن ينظر إلى رجل من أهل الجنة فلينظر إلى هذا" ((متفق عليه)) .
matn_ar_clean: أن أعرابيا أتي النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال: يا رسول الله دلني على عمل إذا عملته، دخلت الجنة. قال: "تعبد الله ولا تشرك به شيئا، وتقيم الصلاة، وتؤتي الزكاة المفروضة، وتصوم رمضان" قال: والذي نفسي بيده، لا أزيد على هذا. فلما ولى قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم : "من سره أن ينظر إلى رجل من أهل الجنة فلينظر إلى هذا" ((متفق عليه)) .
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: A bedouin came to the Prophet (ﷺ) and said: "O Messenger of Allah! Direct me to a deed by which I may be entitled to enter Jannah." The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "Worship Allah, and never associate anything with Him, establish Salat, pay the Zakat which has been enjoined upon you, and observe Saum of Ramadan." He (the bedouin) said: "By Him in Whose Hand my soul is, I will never add anything to these (obligations)." When he turned his back, the Prophet (ﷺ) said, "He who wants to see a man from the dwellers of Jannah, let him look at him (bedouin).".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a bedouin came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: "O Messenger of Allah! Direct me to a deed by which I may be entitled to enter Jannah." the Prophet ﷺ said, "Worship Allah, and never associate anything with Him, establish Salat, pay the Zakat which has been enjoined upon you, and observe Saum of Ramadan." He (the bedouin) said: "By Him in Whose Hand my soul is, I will never add anything to these (obligations)." When he turned his back, the Prophet ﷺ said, "He who wants to see a man from the dwellers of Jannah, let him look at him (bedouin).".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa a bedouin datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: "O Rasulullah! Direct me kepada deed by which I may be entitled to masuk ke Jannah." Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Worship Allah, and never associate apa pun with Him, establish Salat, pay the zakat which has been enjoined upon you, and observe Saum of Ramadan." He (the bedouin) berkata: "By Him in Whose Hand my soul is, I will never add apa pun to these (obligations)." Ketika ia turned his back, Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Barangsiapa yang wants to see seorang laki-laki dari dwellers of Jannah, hendaklah ia look at him (bedouin).".

ar: وعن جرير بن عبد الله، رضي الله عنه، قال‏:‏ بايعت النبي، صلى الله عليه وسلم، على إقام الصلاة، وإيتاء الزكاة، والنصح لكل مسلم‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏ ‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن جرير بن عبد الله، رضي الله عنه، قال: بايعت النبي، صلى الله عليه وسلم، على إقام الصلاة، وإيتاء الزكاة، والنصح لكل مسلم. ((متفق عليه)) .
isnad_ar: وعن جرير بن عبد الله، رضي الله عنه

matn_ar_clean: قال: بايعت النبي، صلى الله عليه وسلم، على إقام الصلاة، وإيتاء الزكاة، والنصح لكل مسلم. ((متفق عليه)) .
sunnah_ref_en: Jarir bin 'Abdullah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: I pledged allegiance to the Prophet (ﷺ) to establish Salat, to pay the Zakat and to have the welfare of every Muslim at heart..
iwh_en: Jarir bin 'Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that i pledged allegiance to the Prophet ﷺ to establish Salat, to pay the Zakat and to have the welfare of every Muslim at heart..
iwh_id: Jarir bin 'Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa i pledged allegiance to Nabi ﷺ to establish Salat, to pay the Zakat dan to have the welfare of every Muslim at heart..

ar:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏"‏ما من صاحب ذهب، ولا فضة، لا يؤدي منها حقها إلا إذا كان يوم القيامة صفحت له صفائح من نار، فأحمي عليها في نار جهنم فيكوى بها جنبه، وجبينه، وظهره، كلما بردت أعيدت له في يوم كان مقداره خمسين ألف سنة، حتى يقضى بين العباد فيرى سبيله، إما إلى الجنة، وإما إلى النار‏"‏ قيل‏:‏ يا رسول الله فالإبل‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏ولا صاحب إبل لا يؤدي منها حقها، ومن حقها حلبها يوم وردها، إلا إذ كان يوم القيامة بطح لها بقاع قرقر أوفر ما كانت، لا يفقد منها فصيلا واحدًا، تطؤه بأخفافها، وتعضه بأفواهها كلما مر عليه أُولاها، رد عليه أُخراها، في يوم كان مقداره خمسين ألف سنة، حتى يقضى بين العباد، فيرى سبيله، إما إلى الجنة، وإما إلى النار‏"‏ قيل‏:‏ يا رسول الله فالبقر والغنم‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏ولا صاحب بقر ولا غنم لا يؤدي منها حقها إلا إذا كان يوم القيامة، بطح لها بقاع قرقر، لا يفقد منها شيئًا ليس فيها عقصاء، ولا جلحاء، ولا عضباء، تنطحه بقرونها، وتطؤه بأظلافها، كلما مر عليه أُولاها، رد عليه أُخراها، في يوم كان مقداره خمسين ألف سنة حتى يقضى بين العباد، فيرى سبيله، إما إلى الجنة، وإما إلى النار‏"‏ ‏.‏ قيل‏:‏ يا رسول الله فالخيل‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏الخيل ثلاثة‏:‏ هي لرجل وزر، وهي لرجل ستر، وهي لرجل أجر، فأما التي هي له وزر فرجل ربطها رياء وفخرًا ونواء على أهل الإسلام، فهي له وزر، وأما التي هي له ستر، فرجل ربطها في سبيل الله، ثم لم ينسَ حق الله في ظهورها، ولا رقابها فهي له ستر، وأما التي هي له أجر، فرجل ربطها في سبيل الله لأهل الإسلام في مرج، أو روضة، فما أكلت من ذلك المرج أو الروضة من شيء إلا كتب له عدد ما أكلت حسنات، وكتب له عدد أرواثها وأبوالها حسنات، ولا تقطع طولها فاستنت شرفًا أو شرفين إلا كتب الله له عدد آثارها، وأرواثها حسنات، ولا مر بها صاحبها على نهر فشربت منه، ولا يريد أن يسقيها إلا كتب الله له عدد ما شربت حسنات‏"‏  
والإيتار قبل النوم إنما يستحب لمن لا يثق باستيقاظ آخر الليل، فإن وثق فآخر الليل أفضل‏.‏

isnad_ar: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم : "ما من صاحب ذهب

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Any person who possesses gold or silver and does not pay what is due on it (i.e., the Zakat); on the Day of Resurrection, sheets of silver and gold would be heated for him in the fire of Hell and with them his flank, forehead and back will be branded. When they cool down, they will be heated again and the same process will be repeated during the day the measure whereof will be fifty thousand years. (This would go on) until Judgement is pronounced among (Allah's) slaves, and he will be shown his final abode, either to Jannah or to Hell." It was asked, "How about someone who owns camels and does not pay what is due on him (i.e., their Zakat)?" He (ﷺ) replied, "In the same way the owner of camels who does not discharge what is due in respect of them (their due includes their milking on the day when they are taken to water) will be thrown on his face or on his back in a vast desert plain on the Day of Resurrection and they will trample upon him with their hoofs and bite him with their teeth. As often as the first of them passes him, the last of them will be made to return during a day the measure whereof will be fifty thousand years, until Judgement is pronounced among (Allah's) slaves, he will be shown his final abode either to Jannah or to Hell." It was (again) asked: "O Messenger of Allah, what about cows (cattle) and sheep?" He (ﷺ) said, "If anyone who possesses cattle and sheep and does not pay what is due on them (i.e., their Zakat); on the Day of Resurrection, he will be thrown on his face in a vast plain desert. He will find none of the animals missing with twisted horns, without horns or with a broken horn, and they will gore him with their horns and trample upon him with their hoofs. As often as the first of them passes him, the last of them will be made to return to him during a day the measure whereof will be fifty thousand years, until Judgement is pronounced among (Allah's) slaves; and he will be shown his final abode either to Jannah or to Hell." It was asked: "O Messenger of Allah, what about the horses?" Upon this he (ﷺ) said, "The horses are of three types. One, which is a burden for the owner; another which is a shield, and another one which makes its owner entitled to reward. The one for whom these are a burden is the person who rears them for show or for pride or for causing injury to the sentiments of the Muslims. They will be a cause of torment for their owners. The one for whom these are a shield is the person who rears them for the sake of Allah but does not forget the Right of Allah concerning their backs and their necks (i.e., he lets a needy ride on them), and so they are a shield for him. Those which bring reward to the one who rears them in pastures and gardens are the ones that are used in the Cause of Allah (Jihad) by the Muslims. Whatever they eat from the meadows and the gardens will be recorded on his behalf as good deeds so much so that their droppings and urine will be counted for an equal number of good deeds for him. Even when they break their tying rope and every height from which they climb and every hoofprint which they leave will be counted as a good deed on behalf of the owner. When their owner leads them through a stream from which they drink, though he does not intend to quench their thirst, yet Allah would record for him the quantity (of water) of what they would drink on his behalf as good deeds." It was asked: "O Messenger of Allah, what about the donkeys?" Upon this he (ﷺ) said, "Nothing has been revealed to me in regard to the donkeys in particular except this one Verse of a comprehensive nature: "So whosoever does good equal to the weight of an atom (or a small ant) shall see it. And whosoever does evil equal to the weight of an atom (or a small ant) shall see it."' (99: 8,9)..

When they cool down, they will be heated again and the same process will be repeated during the day the measure whereof will be fifty thousand years. (This would go on) until Judgement is pronounced among (Allah's) slaves, and he will be shown his final abode, either to Jannah or to Hell." Those which bring reward to the one who rears them in pastures and gardens are the ones that are used in the Cause of Allah (Jihad) by the Muslims. Upon this he (ﷺ) said, "Nothing has been revealed to me in regard to the donkeys in particular except this one Verse of a comprehensive nature: "So whosoever does good equal to the weight of an atom (or a small ant) shall see it. And whosoever does evil equal to the weight of an atom (or a small ant) shall see it."' (99: 8,9)..
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "Any person yang possesses gold or silver dan does not pay what is due on it (i.e., the zakat); on Hari Kebangkitan, sheets of silver dan gold would be heated for him di fire of Neraka dan with them his flank, forehead dan back will be branded. Ketika mereka cool down, they will be heated again dan the same process will be repeated selama the day the measure whereof will be fifty thousand years. (This would go on) hingga Judgement is pronounced di antara (Allah's) slaves, dan ia will be ditunjukkan his final abode, either to Jannah or to Neraka." It was bertanya, "How tentang someone yang owns camels dan does not pay what is due on him (i.e., their zakat)?" He (ﷺ) menjawab, "In the same way the owner of camels yang does not discharge what is due in respect of them (their due includes their milking di day ketika mereka are taken to water) will be thrown on his face or on his back di vast desert plain on Hari Kebangkitan dan mereka will trample upon him with their hoofs dan bite him with their teeth. As often as the pertama of them passes him, the terakhir of them will be membuat to return selama a day the measure whereof will be fifty thousand years, hingga Judgement is pronounced di antara (Allah's) slaves, he will be ditunjukkan his final abode either to Jannah or to Neraka." It was (again) bertanya: "O Rasulullah, what tentang cows (cattle) and sheep?" He (ﷺ) berkata, "If anyone yang possesses cattle dan sheep dan does not pay what is due on them (i.e., their zakat); on Hari Kebangkitan, he will be thrown on his face di vast plain desert. He will menemukan none dari animals missing with twisted horns, tanpa horns or dengan broken horn, dan mereka will gore him with their horns dan trample upon him with their hoofs. As often as the pertama of them passes him, the terakhir of them will be membuat to return to him selama a day the measure whereof will be fifty thousand years, hingga Judgement is pronounced di antara (Allah's) slaves; dan ia will be ditunjukkan his final abode either to Jannah or to Neraka." It was bertanya: "O Rasulullah, what tentang the horses?" Upon this he (ﷺ) berkata, "The horses are of three types. One, which is a burden untuk owner; another which is a shield, and another one which makes its owner entitled to reward. The one for whom these are a burden is the person yang rears them for menunjukkan or for pride or for causing injury kepada sentiments dari Muslims. They will be a cause of torment for their owners. The one for whom these are a shield is the person yang rears them untuk sake of Allah namun does not forget the Right of Allah concerning their backs dan their necks (i.e., he lets a needy ride on them), and jadi they are a shield for him. Those which bring reward kepada one yang rears them in pastures dan gardens are the ones that are menggunakan di Cause of Allah (Jihad) oleh Muslims. Whatever they eat dari meadows dan the gardens will be recorded on his behalf as amal shaleh jadi much sehingga their droppings dan urine will be counted for an equal number of amal shaleh for him. Even ketika mereka break their tying rope dan every height from which they climb dan every hoofprint which they leave will be counted as a baik deed on behalf dari owner. When their owner leads them melalui a stream from which they drink, though he does not intend to quench their thirst, yet Allah would record for him the quantity (of water) of what mereka drink on his behalf as amal shaleh." It was bertanya: "O Rasulullah, what tentang the donkeys?" Upon this he (ﷺ) berkata, "Nothing has been revealed to me in regard kepada donkeys in particular except this one Verse dari comprehensive nature: "Jadi whosoever does baik equal kepada weight of an atom (or a kecil ant) shall see it. And whosoever does evil equal kepada weight of an atom (or a kecil ant) shall see it."' (99: 8,9)..

ar: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه، قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏"‏قال الله عز وجل‏:‏ كل عمل ابن آدم له إلا الصيام، فإنه لي وأنا أجزي به‏.‏ والصيام جُنة فإذا كان يوم صوم أحدكم فلا يرفث ولا يصخب، فإن سابه أحد أو قاتله، فليقل‏:‏ إني صائم‏.‏ والذي نفس محمد بيده لخُلوف فم الصائم أطيب عند الله من ريح المسك‏.‏  ‏"‏للصائم فرحتان يفرحهما‏:‏ إذا أفطر فرح بفطره، وإذا لقي ربه فرح بصومه‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏ ‏.‏‏(‏‏(‏وهذا لفظ رواية البخاري‏.‏ وفي رواية له‏:‏ يترك طعامه، وشرابه، وشهوته، من أجلي، الصيام لي وأنا أجزي به، والحسنة بعشر أمثالها‏.‏ وفي رواية لمسلم‏:‏ ‏"‏كل عمل ابن آدم يضاعف‏:‏ الحسنة بعشر أمثالها إلى سبعمائة ضعف‏.‏ قال الله تعالى‏:‏ ‏(إلا الصوم فإنه لي وأنا أجزي به‏:‏ يدع شهوته وطعامه من أجلي‏.‏ للصائم فرحتان‏:‏ فرحة عند فطره، وفرحة عند لقاء ربه‏.‏ ولخلوف فيه أطيب عند الله من ريح المسك‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Allah the Exalted and Majestic said: 'Every act of the son of Adam is for him, except As-Siyam (the fasting) which is (exclusively) for Me, and I will reward him for it.' Fasting is a shield. When anyone of you is observing fast, he should neither indulge in obscene language nor should he raise his voice; and if anyone reviles him or tries to quarrel with him, he should say: 'I am fasting.' By Him in Whose Hand the soul of Muhammad is, the breath of one observing Saum is sweeter to Allah than the fragrance of musk. The one who fasts, experiences two joys: he feels pleasure when he breaks the fast. He is joyful by virtue of his fast when he meets his Rubb.".In a narration by Al-Bukhari, the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Allah says: '(The person observing Saum) has abstained from food and drink, and sexual pleasures for My sake; fasting is for Me, and I will bestow its reward. Every good deed has ten times its reward'."In a narration by Muslim, the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The reward of every (good) deed of a person is multiplied from ten to seven hundred times. Allah (SWT) says: 'The reward of observing Saum is different from the reward of other good deeds; Saum is for Me, and I Alone will give its reward. The person observing Saum abstains from food and drink only for My sake.' The fasting person has two joyous occasions, one at the time of breaking his fast, and the other at the time of meeting his Rubb. Surely, the breath of one observing Saum is better smelling to Allah than the fragrance of musk."
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Allah the Exalted and Majestic said: 'Every act of the son of Adam is for him, except As-Siyam (the fasting) which is (exclusively) for Me, and I will reward him for it.' Fasting is a shield. When anyone of you is observing fast, he should neither indulge in obscene language nor should he raise his voice; and if anyone reviles him or tries to quarrel with him, he should say: 'I am fasting.' By Him in Whose Hand the soul of Muhammad is, the breath of one observing Saum is sweeter to Allah than the fragrance of musk. The one who fasts, experiences two joys: he feels pleasure when he breaks the fast. He is joyful by virtue of his fast when he meets his Rubb.".In a narration by Al-Bukhari, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Allah says: '(The person observing Saum) has abstained from food and drink, and sexual pleasures for My sake; fasting is for Me, and I will bestow its reward. Every good deed has ten times its reward'."In a narration by Muslim, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The reward of every (good) deed of a person is multiplied from ten to seven hundred times. Allah (SWT) says: 'The reward of observing Saum is different from the reward of other good deeds; Saum is for Me, and I Alone will give its reward. The person observing Saum abstains from food and drink only for My sake.' The fasting person has two joyous occasions, one at the time of breaking his fast, and the other at the time of meeting his Rubb. Surely, the breath of one observing Saum is better smelling to Allah than the fragrance of musk."
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "Allah the Exalted and Majestic berkata: 'Every act dari putra Adam is for him, except As-Siyam (the puasa) which is (exclusively) for Me, dan aku will reward him for it.' Fasting is a shield. When anyone of you is observing fast, he harus neither indulge in obscene language dan tidak harus he raise his voice; dan if anyone reviles him or tries to quarrel with him, he harus say: 'I am puasa.' By Him in Whose Hand the soul of Muhammad is, the breath of one observing Saum is sweeter to Allah than the fragrance of musk. The one yang fasts, experiences two joys: he feels pleasure ketika ia breaks the fast. He is joyful by virtue of his fast ketika ia meets his Rubb.".In a narration by Al-Bukhari, Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "Allah berkata: '(The person observing Saum) has abstained from food dan drink, and sexual pleasures for My sake; puasa is for Me, dan aku will bestow its reward. Every baik deed has ten times its reward'."In a narration by Muslim, Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "The reward of every (baik) deed dari person is multiplied from ten to seven hundred times. Allah (SWT) berkata: 'The reward of observing Saum is different dari reward of other amal shaleh; Saum is for Me, dan aku Alone will memberikan its reward. The person observing Saum abstains from food dan drink only for My sake.' The puasa person has two joyous occasions, one at the time of breaking his fast, and the other at the time of meeting his Rubb. Surely, the breath of one observing Saum is better smelling to Allah than the fragrance of musk."

ar: وعنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏‏"‏ من أنفق زوجين في سبيل الله نودي من أبواب الجنة ‏:‏يا عبد الله هذا خير، فمن كان من أهل الصلاة دعي من باب الصلاة، ومن كان من أهل الجهاد دعي من باب الجهاد، ومن كان من أهل الصيام دعي من باب الريان، ومن كان من أهل الصدقة دعي من باب الصدقة ‏"‏ قال أبو بكر، رضي الله عنه ‏:‏بأبي أنت وأمي يا رسول الله ما على من دعي من تلك الأبواب من ضرورة، فهل يدعى أحد من تلك الأبواب كلها‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏ نعم وأرجو أن تكون منهم ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean: وعنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال:" من أنفق زوجين في سبيل الله نودي من أبواب الجنة :يا عبد الله هذا خير، فمن كان من أهل الصلاة دعي من باب الصلاة، ومن كان من أهل الجهاد دعي من باب الجهاد، ومن كان من أهل الصيام دعي من باب الريان، ومن كان من أهل الصدقة دعي من باب الصدقة " قال أبو بكر، رضي الله عنه :بأبي أنت وأمي يا رسول الله ما على من دعي من تلك الأبواب من ضرورة، فهل يدعى أحد من تلك الأبواب كلها؟ قال: " نعم وأرجو أن تكون منهم ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar: وعنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏‏"‏ من أنفق زوجين في سبيل الله نودي من أبواب الجنة ‏:‏يا عبد الله هذا خير، فمن كان من أهل الصلاة دعي من باب الصلاة، ومن كان من أهل الجهاد دعي من باب الجهاد، ومن كان من أهل الصيام دعي من باب الريان، ومن كان من أهل الصدقة دعي من باب الصدقة ‏"‏ قال أبو بكر، رضي الله عنه ‏:‏بأبي أنت وأمي يا رسول الله ما على من دعي من تلك الأبواب من ضرورة، فهل يدعى أحد من تلك الأبواب كلها‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏ نعم وأرجو أن تكون منهم ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
matn_ar_clean: وعنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏‏"‏ من أنفق زوجين في سبيل الله نودي من أبواب الجنة ‏:‏يا عبد الله هذا خير، فمن كان من أهل الصلاة دعي من باب الصلاة، ومن كان من أهل الجهاد دعي من باب الجهاد، ومن كان من أهل الصيام دعي من باب الريان، ومن كان من أهل الصدقة دعي من باب الصدقة ‏"‏ قال أبو بكر، رضي الله عنه ‏:‏بأبي أنت وأمي يا رسول الله ما على من دعي من تلك الأبواب من ضرورة، فهل يدعى أحد من تلك الأبواب كلها‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏ نعم وأرجو أن تكون منهم ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "He who spends a pair in the way of Allah will be called from the gates of Jannah: 'O slave of Allah! This gate is better for you' and one who is constant in Salat (prayer), will be called from the Gate of Salat; and whoever is eager in fighting in the Cause of Allah, will be called from the Gate of Jihad; and who is regular in observing Saum will be called from Ar-Raiyan Gate. The one who is generous in charity will be called from the Gate of Charity." Abu Bakr (May Allah be pleased with him) said: "O Messenger of Allah (ﷺ)! May my mother and father be sacrificed for you! Those who are called from these gates will stand in need of nothing. Will anybody be called from all of those gates?" He replied, "Yes, and I hope that you will be one of them.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "He who spends a pair in the way of Allah will be called from the gates of Jannah: 'O slave of Allah! This gate is better for you' and one who is constant in Salat (prayer), will be called from the Gate of Salat; and whoever is eager in fighting in the Cause of Allah, will be called from the Gate of Jihad; and who is regular in observing Saum will be called from Ar-Raiyan Gate. The one who is generous in charity will be called from the Gate of Charity." Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "O Messenger of Allah (ﷺ)! May my mother and father be sacrificed for you! Those who are called from these gates will stand in need of nothing. Will anybody be called from all of those gates?" He replied, "Yes, and I hope that you will be one of them.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "Barangsiapa yang spends a pair di way of Allah will be called dari gates of Jannah: 'O slave of Allah! This gate is better for you' and one yang constant in Salat (shalat), will be called dari Gate of Salat; dan siapa pun yang is eager in fighting di Cause of Allah, will be called dari Gate of Jihad; dan yang regular in observing Saum will be called from Ar-Raiyan Gate. The one yang generous in sedekah will be called dari Gate of Charity." Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "O Rasulullah ﷺ! May my mother dan father be sacrificed for you! Those yang are called from these gates will berdiri in need of tidak ada. Will anybody be called from all of those gates?" Ia menjawab, "Yes, dan aku hope that you will be one of them.".

ar:
وعن سهل بن سعد رضي الله عنه عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إن في الجنة بابًا يقال له‏:‏ الريان، يدخل منه الصائمون يوم القيامة لا يدخل منه أحد غيرهم يقال‏:‏ أين الصائمون‏؟‏ فيقومون  لا يدخل منه أحد غيرهم، فإذا دخلوا أغلق فلم يدخل منه أحد‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean:
وعن سهل بن سعد رضي الله عنه عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: 
"إن في الجنة بابًا يقال له: الريان، يدخل منه الصائمون يوم القيامة لا يدخل منه أحد غيرهم يقال: أين الصائمون؟ فيقومون لا يدخل منه أحد غيرهم، فإذا دخلوا أغلق فلم يدخل منه أحد" ((متفق عليه))
isnad_ar: وعن سهل بن سعد رضي الله عنه عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال:
matn_ar: "إن في الجنة بابًا يقال له: الريان، يدخل منه الصائمون يوم القيامة لا يدخل منه أحد غيرهم يقال: أين الصائمون؟ فيقومون لا يدخل منه أحد غيرهم، فإذا دخلوا أغلق فلم يدخل منه أحد" ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar_clean: "إن في الجنة بابا يقال له: الريان، يدخل منه الصائمون يوم القيامة لا يدخل منه أحد غيرهم يقال: أين الصائمون؟ فيقومون لا يدخل منه أحد غيرهم، فإذا دخلوا أغلق فلم يدخل منه أحد" ((متفق عليه))
sunnah_ref_en: Sahl bin Sa'd (May Allah be pleased with him): The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "In Jannah there is a gate which is called Ar-Raiyan through which only those who observe Saum (fasting) will enter on the Day of Resurrection. None else will enter through it. It will be called out, "Where are those who observe fasting?" So they will stand up and proceed towards it. When the last of them will have entered, the gate will be closed and then no one will enter through that gate.".
iwh_en: Sahl bin Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him): the Prophet ﷺ said, "In Jannah there is a gate which is called Ar-Raiyan through which only those who observe Saum (fasting) will enter on the Day of Resurrection. None else will enter through it. It will be called out, "Where are those who observe fasting?" So they will stand up and proceed towards it. When the last of them will have entered, the gate will be closed and then no one will enter through that gate.".
iwh_id: Sahl bin Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu): Nabi ﷺ berkata, "In Jannah there is a gate which is called Ar-Raiyan melalui which only those who observe Saum (puasa) will masuk ke on Hari Kebangkitan. None else will masuk ke melalui it. It will be called out, "Where are those who observe puasa?" Jadi they will berdiri up dan proceed kepada it. When the terakhir of them will have entered, the gate will be closed dan kemudian no one will masuk ke melalui that gate.".

ar:
وعن أبي سعيد الخدري، رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏
"‏ ما من عبد يصوم يومًا في سبيل الله إلا باعد الله بذلك اليوم وجهه عن النار سبعين خريفًا‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean:
وعن أبي سعيد الخدري، رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم 
" ما من عبد يصوم يومًا في سبيل الله إلا باعد الله بذلك اليوم وجهه عن النار سبعين خريفًا" ((متفق عليه))
isnad_ar: وعن أبي سعيد الخدري، رضي الله عنه

" ما من عبد يصوم يومًا في سبيل الله إلا باعد الله بذلك اليوم وجهه عن النار سبعين خريفًا" ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar_clean:
قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم 
" ما من عبد يصوم يوما في سبيل الله إلا باعد الله بذلك اليوم وجهه عن النار سبعين خريفا" ((متفق عليه))
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Every slave of Allah who observes Saum (fasting) for one day for the sake of Allah, Allah will draw his face farther from Hell-fire to the extent of a distance to be covered in seventy years.".
iwh_en: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Every slave of Allah who observes Saum (fasting) for one day for the sake of Allah, Allah will draw his face farther from Hell-fire to the extent of a distance to be covered in seventy years.".
iwh_id: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Every slave of Allah who observes Saum (fasting) for one day for the sake of Allah, Allah will draw his face farther from Hell-fire to the extent of a distance to be covered in seventy years.".

ar: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ من صام رمضان إيمانًا واحتسابًا، غفر له ما تقدم من ذنبه ‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "He who observes fasting during the month of Ramadan with Faith while seeking its reward from Allah, will have his past sins forgiven.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said, "He who observes fasting during the month of Ramadan with Faith while seeking its reward from Allah, will have his past sins forgiven.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Barangsiapa yang observes puasa selama the month of Ramadan with iman while seeking its reward from Allah, will have his past sins forgiven.".

ar:
وعنه رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إذا جاء رمضان فتحت أبواب الجنة، وغلقت أبواب النار، وصفدت الشياطين‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "When Ramadan begins, the gates of Jannah are opened, the gates of Hell are closed, and the devils are chained.".

ar:
وعنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏"‏صوموا لرؤيته، وأفطروا لرؤيته، فإن غَبِيَ عليكم فأكملوا عدة شعبان ثلاثين‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه وهذا لفظ البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏  
وفي رواية مسلم‏:‏ ‏"‏فإن غم عليكم فصوموا ثلاثين يومًا‏"‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Observe Saum (fast) on sighting the crescent and terminate it on sighting it (the new moon), but if the sky is cloudy before you, then complete the number (thirty days) of the month.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Observe Saum (fast) on sighting the crescent and terminate it on sighting it (the new moon), but if the sky is cloudy before you, then complete the number (thirty days) of the month.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Observe Saum (fast) on sighting the crescent dan terminate it on sighting it (the baru moon), namun if the sky is cloudy sebelum you, kemudian complete the number (thirty days) of the month.".

ar: وعن ابن عباس رضي الله عنهما‏:‏ قال‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم أجود الناس، وكان أجود ما يكون في رمضان حين يلقاه جبريل وكان جبريل يلقاه في كل ليلة من رمضان فيدارسه القرآن فَلَرَسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم حين يلقاه جبريل أجود بالخير من الريح المرسلة‏"‏ ‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean: وعن ابن عباس رضي الله عنهما: قال: كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم أجود الناس، وكان أجود ما يكون في رمضان حين يلقاه جبريل وكان جبريل يلقاه في كل ليلة من رمضان فيدارسه القرآن فَلَرَسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم حين يلقاه جبريل أجود بالخير من الريح المرسلة" . ((متفق عليه))
isnad_ar: وعن ابن عباس رضي الله عنهما: قال: كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم أجود الناس

matn_ar_clean: وكان أجود ما يكون في رمضان حين يلقاه جبريل وكان جبريل يلقاه في كل ليلة من رمضان فيدارسه القرآن فلرسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم حين يلقاه جبريل أجود بالخير من الريح المرسلة" . ((متفق عليه))
sunnah_ref_en: Ibn 'Abbas (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) was the most generous of the men; and he was the most generous during the month of Ramadan when Jibril visited him every night and recited the Qur'an to him. During this period, the generosity of Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) waxed faster than the rain bearing wind..
iwh_en: Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was the most generous of the men; and he was the most generous during the month of Ramadan when Jibril visited him every night and recited the Qur'an to him. During this period, the generosity of Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) waxed faster than the rain bearing wind..
iwh_id: Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ was the most generous of the men; dan ia was the most generous selama the month of Ramadan when Jibril visited him every night dan recited the Qur'an to him. During this period, the generosity of Rasulullah ﷺ waxed faster than the rain bearing wind..

ar: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم إذا دخل العشر أحيا الليل وأيقظ أهله، وشد المئزر‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت: كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم إذا دخل العشر أحيا الليل وأيقظ أهله، وشد المئزر" ((متفق عليه))
isnad_ar: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت: كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم إذا دخل العشر أحيا الليل وأيقظ أهله
matn_ar: وشد المئزر" ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar_clean: وشد المئزر" ((متفق عليه))
sunnah_ref_en: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: When the last ten nights (of Ramadan) would begin, the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) would keep awake at night (for prayer and devotion), awaken his family and prepare himself to be more diligent in worship..
iwh_en: 'Aishah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported: When the last ten nights (of Ramadan) would begin, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would keep awake at night (for prayer and devotion), awaken his family and prepare himself to be more diligent in worship..
iwh_id: 'Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan: When the terakhir ten nights (of Ramadan) would begin, Rasulullah ﷺ would menjaga awake at night (for prayer dan devotion), awaken his family dan prepare himself to be more diligent in worship..

ar:
عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏لا يتقدمن أحدكم رمضان بصوم يوم أو يومين، إلا أن يكون رجل كان يصوم صومه، فليصم ذلك اليوم‏"‏ ‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "Do not observe Saum (fasting) for a day or two days preceding Ramadan. However, if a person is in the habit of observing Saum on a particular day (which may fall on these dates), he may fast on that day.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said, "Do not observe Saum (fasting) for a day or two days preceding Ramadan. However, if a person is in the habit of observing Saum on a particular day (which may fall on these dates), he may fast on that day.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Jangan observe Saum (puasa) for a day or two days preceding Ramadan. Namun, if seseorang is in the habit of observing Saum on a particular day (which may fall on these dates), he may fast on that day.".

"‏ لا تصوموا قبل رمضان صوموا لرؤيته وأفطروا لرؤيته، فإن حالت دونه فأكملوا ثلاثين يومًا‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه الترمذي وقال حديث حسن صحيح‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Ibn 'Abbas (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Do not observe Saum (fasting) before the advent of Ramadan. Observe Saum at sighting of the crescent of Ramadan and terminate it at sighting the crescent (of Shawwal). If the sky is overcast, complete (the month as) thirty (days).".
iwh_en: Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Do not observe Saum (fasting) before the advent of Ramadan. Observe Saum at sighting of the crescent of Ramadan and terminate it at sighting the crescent (of Shawwal). If the sky is overcast, complete (the month as) thirty (days).".
iwh_id: Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Jangan observe Saum (fasting) sebelum the advent of Ramadan. Observe Saum at sighting of the crescent of Ramadan dan terminate it at sighting the crescent (of Shawwal). If the sky is overcast, complete (the month as) thirty (days).".

ar:
وعن أبي اليقظان عمار بن ياسر، رضي الله عنهما قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏من صام اليوم الذي يشك فيه فقد عصي أبا القاسم، صلى الله عليه وسلم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود والترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن صحيح‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: 'Ammar bin Yasir (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: He who observes the fast on a doubtful day, has in fact disobeyed Abul-Qasim, (i.e., Messenger of Allah (ﷺ))..
iwh_en: 'Ammar bin Yasir (may Allah be pleased with them) reported: He who observes the fast on a doubtful day, has in fact disobeyed Abul-Qasim, (i.e., Messenger of Allah (ﷺ))..
iwh_id: 'Ammar bin Yasir (radhiyallahu 'anhum) meriwayatkan: He who observes the fast on a doubtful day, has in fact disobeyed Abul-Qasim, (i.e., Rasulullah ﷺ)..

ar:
عن طلحة بن عبيد الله رضي الله عنه أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم كان إذا رأى الهلال قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏اللهم أهله علينا بالأمن والإيمان والسلامة والإسلام، ربي وربك الله، هلال رشد وخير‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه الترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Talhah bin Ubaidullah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: At the sight of the new moon (of the lunar month), the Prophet (ﷺ) used to supplicate: "Allahumma ahillahu 'alaina bil-amni wal-iman, was-salamati wal-Islam, Rabbi wa Rabbuk-Allah, Hilalu rushdin wa khairin (O Allah, let this moon appear on us with security and Iman; with safety and Islam. (O moon!) Your Rubb and mine is Allah. May this moon be bringing guidance and good).".
iwh_en: Talhah bin Ubaidullah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that at the sight of the new moon (of the lunar month), the Prophet ﷺ used to supplicate: "Allahumma ahillahu 'alaina bil-amni wal-iman, was-salamati wal-Islam, Rabbi wa Rabbuk-Allah, Hilalu rushdin wa khairin (O Allah, let this moon appear on us with security and Iman; with safety and Islam. (O moon!) Your Rubb and mine is Allah. May this moon be bringing guidance and good).".
iwh_id: Talhah bin Ubaidullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa at the sight of the baru moon (of the lunar month), Nabi ﷺ biasa supplicate: "Allahumma ahillahu 'alaina bil-amni wal-iman, was-salamati wal-Islam, Rabbi wa Rabbuk-Allah, Hilalu rushdin wa khairin (Ya Allah, let this moon appear on us with security and Iman; with safety and Islam. (O moon!) Your Rubb dan mine is Allah. May this moon be bringing guidance dan baik).".

ar:

"‏تسحروا فإن في السحور بركة‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏

"تسحروا فإن في السحور بركة" ((متفق عليه))
sunnah_ref_en: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Eat Suhur (predawn meal). Surely, there is a blessing in Suhur.".
iwh_en: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Eat Suhur (predawn meal). Surely, there is a blessing in Suhur.".
iwh_id: Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Eat Suhur (predawn meal). Surely, there is a blessing in Suhur.".

ar: وعن زيد بن ثابت رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ تسحرنا مع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ثم قمنا إلى الصلاة قيل كم كان بينهما‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ خمسون آية ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean: وعن زيد بن ثابت رضي الله عنه قال: تسحرنا مع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ثم قمنا إلى الصلاة قيل كم كان بينهما؟ قال: خمسون آية ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar: وعن زيد بن ثابت رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ تسحرنا مع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ثم قمنا إلى الصلاة قيل كم كان بينهما‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ خمسون آية ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
matn_ar_clean: وعن زيد بن ثابت رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ تسحرنا مع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ثم قمنا إلى الصلاة قيل كم كان بينهما‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ خمسون آية ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
sunnah_ref_en: Zaid bin Thabit (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: We took Suhur (predawn meal) with the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) and then we stood up for (Fajr) Salat (prayer). It was asked: "How long was the gap between the two?" He replied: "The time required for the recitation of fifty Ayat.".
iwh_en: Zaid bin Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that we took Suhur (predawn meal) with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and then we stood up for (Fajr) Salat (prayer). It was asked: "How long was the gap between the two?" He replied: "The time required for the recitation of fifty Ayat.".
iwh_id: Zaid bin Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa we mengambil Suhur (predawn meal) with Rasulullah ﷺ dan kemudian we berdiri up for (Subuh) Salat (prayer). It was bertanya: "How panjang was the gap antara the two?" Ia menjawab: "The time required for the recitation of fifty Ayat.".

ar:
وعن ابن عمر رضي الله عنهما قال‏:‏ كان لرسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم مؤذنان‏:‏ بلال وابن أم مكتوم‏.‏ فقال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏
"‏ إن بلالا يؤذن بليل فكلوا واشربوا حتى يؤذن ابن أم مكتوم‏"‏ قال ولم يكن بينهما إلا أن ينزل هذا ويرقى هذا، ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏

sunnah_ref_en: Ibn 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) had two Mu'adhdhin: Bilal and Ibn Umm Maktum (May Allah be pleased with them). The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Bilal proclaims Adhan .
iwh_en: Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had two Mu'adhdhin: Bilal and Ibn Umm Maktum (may Allah be pleased with them). the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Bilal proclaims Adhan .
iwh_id: Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ had two Mu'adhdhin: Bilal and Ibn Umm Maktum (radhiyallahu 'anhum). Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Bilal proclaims Adhan .

ar: وعن عمرو بن العاص رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله قال‏:‏ ‏"‏فصل ما بين صيامنا وصيام أهل الكتاب أكلة السحر‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن عمرو بن العاص رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله قال: "فصل ما بين صيامنا وصيام أهل الكتاب أكلة السحر. ((رواه مسلم)).
isnad_ar: وعن عمرو بن العاص رضي الله عنه
matn_ar: أن رسول الله قال: "فصل ما بين صيامنا وصيام أهل الكتاب أكلة السحر. ((رواه مسلم)).
matn_ar_clean: أن رسول الله قال: "فصل ما بين صيامنا وصيام أهل الكتاب أكلة السحر. ((رواه مسلم)).
sunnah_ref_en: 'Amr bin Al-'As (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The difference between our observance of Saum (fasting) and that of the people of the Scriptures is Suhur (predawn meal in Ramadan).".
iwh_en: 'Amr bin Al-'As (may Allah be pleased with him) reported: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The difference between our observance of Saum (fasting) and that of the people of the Scriptures is Suhur (predawn meal in Ramadan).".
iwh_id: 'Amr bin Al-'As (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "The difference antara our observance of Saum (fasting) and that of the orang-orang of the Scriptures is Suhur (predawn meal in Ramadan).".

ar:
عن سهل بن سعد رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏لا يزال الناس بخير ما عجلوا الفطر‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean:
عن سهل بن سعد رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: 
"لا يزال الناس بخير ما عجلوا الفطر" ((متفق عليه))
isnad_ar: عن سهل بن سعد رضي الله عنه
matn_ar:
أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: 
"لا يزال الناس بخير ما عجلوا الفطر" ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar_clean:
أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: 
"لا يزال الناس بخير ما عجلوا الفطر" ((متفق عليه))
sunnah_ref_en: Sahl bin Sa'd (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "People will continue to adhere to good as long as they hasten to break the Saum (fasting).".
iwh_en: Sahl bin Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "People will continue to adhere to good as long as they hasten to break the Saum (fasting).".
iwh_id: Sahl bin Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "People will continue to adhere to baik as panjang as they hasten to break the Saum (fasting).".

ar: وعن أبي عطية قال‏:‏ دخلت أنا ومسروق على عائشة رضي الله عنها فقال لها مسروق‏:‏ رجلان من أصحاب محمد صلى الله عليه وسلم كلاهما لا يألو عن الخير‏:‏ أحدهما يعجل المغرب والإفطار، والآخر يؤخر المغرب والإفطار‏؟‏ فقالت‏:‏ من يعجل المغرب والإفطار‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ عبد الله - يعني ابن مسعود- فقالت‏:‏ هكذا كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يصنع‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن أبي عطية قال: دخلت أنا ومسروق على عائشة رضي الله عنها فقال لها مسروق: رجلان من أصحاب محمد صلى الله عليه وسلم كلاهما لا يألو عن الخير: أحدهما يعجل المغرب والإفطار، والآخر يؤخر المغرب والإفطار؟ فقالت: من يعجل المغرب والإفطار؟ قال: عبد الله - يعني ابن مسعود- فقالت: هكذا كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يصنع" ((رواه مسلم)).
isnad_ar: وعن أبي عطية قال: دخلت أنا ومسروق على عائشة رضي الله عنها فقال لها مسروق: رجلان من أصحاب محمد صلى الله عليه وسلم كلاهما لا يألو عن الخير: أحدهما يعجل المغرب والإفطار
matn_ar: والآخر يؤخر المغرب والإفطار؟ فقالت: من يعجل المغرب والإفطار؟ قال: عبد الله - يعني ابن مسعود- فقالت: هكذا كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يصنع" ((رواه مسلم)).
matn_ar_clean: والآخر يؤخر المغرب والإفطار؟ فقالت: من يعجل المغرب والإفطار؟ قال: عبد الله - يعني ابن مسعود- فقالت: هكذا كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يصنع" ((رواه مسلم)).
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Atiyyah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: Masruq and I visited 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) and said: "O Mother of the Believers! There are two Companions of Muhammad (ﷺ) and neither of them holds back from doing good acts; but one of them hastens to break Saum (fasting) and hastens to perform the Maghrib prayer, while the other delays breaking Saum and delays performing Salat (prayer)." She asked, "Who is the one who hastens to break Saum and perform the Maghrib prayer?" Masruq said, "It is 'Abdullah (meaning 'Abdullah bin Mas'ud)." She said, "The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) used to do so.".
iwh_en: Abu Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that masruq and I visited 'Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) and said: "O Mother of the Believers! There are two Companions of Muhammad (ﷺ) and neither of them holds back from doing good acts; but one of them hastens to break Saum (fasting) and hastens to perform the Maghrib prayer, while the other delays breaking Saum and delays performing Salat (prayer)." She asked, "Who is the one who hastens to break Saum and perform the Maghrib prayer?" Masruq said, "It is 'Abdullah (meaning 'Abdullah bin Mas'ud)." She said, "the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to do so.".
iwh_id: Abu Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa masruq dan aku visited 'Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) and bersabda: "O Mother of the Believers! There are two Companions of Muhammad (ﷺ) and neither of them holds back from doing baik acts; namun one of them hastens to break Saum (fasting) and hastens to perform the Maghrib prayer, while the other delays breaking Saum dan delays performing Salat (prayer)." Ia bertanya, "Who is the one who hastens to break Saum dan perform the Maghrib prayer?" Masruq bersabda, "It is 'Abdullah (meaning 'Abdullah bin Mas'ud)." She bersabda, "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa do jadi.".

ar:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال الله عز وجل‏:‏ ‏
"‏أحب عبادي إلي أعجلهم فطرًا‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه الترمذي وقال حديث حسن‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال الله عز وجل: 
"أحب عبادي إلي أعجلهم فطرًا" ((رواه الترمذي وقال حديث حسن)).
isnad_ar: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال الله عز وجل:
matn_ar: "أحب عبادي إلي أعجلهم فطرًا" ((رواه الترمذي وقال حديث حسن)).
matn_ar_clean: "أحب عبادي إلي أعجلهم فطرا" ((رواه الترمذي وقال حديث حسن)).
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Allah the Most High says: 'From amongst my slaves, the quicker the one is in breaking the Saum (fasting), the dearer is he to me."'.
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Allah the Most High says: 'From amongst my slaves, the quicker the one is in breaking the Saum (fasting), the dearer is he to me."'.
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Allah Yang Maha Tinggi bersabda: 'From amongst my slaves, the quicker the one is in breaking the Saum (fasting), the dearer is he to me."'.

ar:
وعن عمر بن الخطاب، رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ ‏
"‏إذا أقبل الليل من ههنا وأدبر النهار من ههنا، وغربت الشمس، فقد أفطر الصائم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean:
وعن عمر بن الخطاب، رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: 
"إذا أقبل الليل من ههنا وأدبر النهار من ههنا، وغربت الشمس، فقد أفطر الصائم" ((متفق عليه))
isnad_ar: وعن عمر بن الخطاب، رضي الله عنه
matn_ar:
قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: 
"إذا أقبل الليل من ههنا وأدبر النهار من ههنا، وغربت الشمس، فقد أفطر الصائم" ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar_clean:
قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: 
"إذا أقبل الليل من ههنا وأدبر النهار من ههنا، وغربت الشمس، فقد أفطر الصائم" ((متفق عليه))
sunnah_ref_en: 'Umar bin Al-Khattab (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said: "When the night approaches from this side (i.e., the east) and the day retreats from that side (i.e., west) and the sun sets, then it is time for a person observing Saum (fasting) to break his fast.".
iwh_en: 'Umar bin Al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) reported: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "When the night approaches from this side (i.e., the east) and the day retreats from that side (i.e., west) and the sun sets, then it is time for a person observing Saum (fasting) to break his fast.".
iwh_id: 'Umar bin Al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "When the night approaches from this side (i.e., the east) and the day retreats from that side (i.e., west) and the sun sets, kemudian it is time for seseorang observing Saum (fasting) to break his fast.".

ar: وعن أبي إبراهيم عبد الله بن أبي أوفى، رضي الله عنهما قال‏:‏ سرنا مع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم وهو صائم فلما غربت الشمس قال لبعض القوم‏:‏ ‏"‏يا فلان انزل فاجدح لنا، فقال‏:‏ يا رسول الله لو أمسيت‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏انزل فاجدح لنا‏"‏ قال‏:‏ إن عليك نهارًا، قال‏:‏ ‏"‏انزل فاجدح لنا‏"‏ قال‏:‏ فنزل فجدح لهم فشرب رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ثم قال‏:‏ ‏"‏إذا رأيتم الليل قد أقبل من ههنا، فقد أفطر الصائم‏"‏ وأشار بيده قبل المشرق‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean: وعن أبي إبراهيم عبد الله بن أبي أوفى، رضي الله عنهما قال: سرنا مع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم وهو صائم فلما غربت الشمس قال لبعض القوم: "يا فلان انزل فاجدح لنا، فقال: يا رسول الله لو أمسيت؟ قال: "انزل فاجدح لنا" قال: إن عليك نهارًا، قال: "انزل فاجدح لنا" قال: فنزل فجدح لهم فشرب رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ثم قال: "إذا رأيتم الليل قد أقبل من ههنا، فقد أفطر الصائم" وأشار بيده قبل المشرق. ((متفق عليه))
isnad_ar: وعن أبي إبراهيم عبد الله بن أبي أوفى، رضي الله عنه
matn_ar: ما قال: سرنا مع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم وهو صائم فلما غربت الشمس قال لبعض القوم: "يا فلان انزل فاجدح لنا، فقال: يا رسول الله لو أمسيت؟ قال: "انزل فاجدح لنا" قال: إن عليك نهارًا، قال: "انزل فاجدح لنا" قال: فنزل فجدح لهم فشرب رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ثم قال: "إذا رأيتم الليل قد أقبل من ههنا، فقد أفطر الصائم" وأشار بيده قبل المشرق. ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar_clean: ما قال: سرنا مع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم وهو صائم فلما غربت الشمس قال لبعض القوم: "يا فلان انزل فاجدح لنا، فقال: يا رسول الله لو أمسيت؟ قال: "انزل فاجدح لنا" قال: إن عليك نهارا، قال: "انزل فاجدح لنا" قال: فنزل فجدح لهم فشرب رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ثم قال: "إذا رأيتم الليل قد أقبل من ههنا، فقد أفطر الصائم" وأشار بيده قبل المشرق. ((متفق عليه))
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Ibrahim 'Abdullah bin Abu Aufa (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: We were with the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) on a journey and he was observing Saum (fasting). When the sun set, he (ﷺ) said to a person, "Dismount and prepare the ground roasted barley drink for us." Upon this he replied, "O Messenger of Allah, there is daylight still." The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Get down and prepare barley drink for us." He said, "But it is still daytime." The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) again said to him, "Get down and prepare barely drink for us." So he got down and prepared a barley liquid meal for him. The Prophet (ﷺ) drank that and then said, "When you perceive the night approaching from that side, a person observing Saum (fasting) should break the fast." And he (ﷺ) pointed towards the east with his hand..
iwh_en: Abu Ibrahim 'Abdullah bin Abu Aufa (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that we were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a journey and he was observing Saum (fasting). When the sun set, he (ﷺ) said to a person, "Dismount and prepare the ground roasted barley drink for us." Upon this he replied, "O Messenger of Allah, there is daylight still." the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Get down and prepare barley drink for us." He said, "But it is still daytime." the Messenger of Allah ﷺ again said to him, "Get down and prepare barely drink for us." So he got down and prepared a barley liquid meal for him. the Prophet ﷺ drank that and then said, "When you perceive the night approaching from that side, a person observing Saum (fasting) should break the fast." And he (ﷺ) pointed towards the east with his hand..
iwh_id: Abu Ibrahim 'Abdullah bin Abu Aufa (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa we were with Rasulullah ﷺ on a journey dan ia was observing Saum (puasa). When the sun set, he (ﷺ) berkata kepada person, "Dismount dan prepare the ground roasted barley drink for us." Upon this ia menjawab, "O Rasulullah, there is daylight still." Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "Get down dan prepare barley drink for us." He berkata, "Namun it is still daytime." Rasulullah ﷺ again bersabda kepadanya,, "Get down dan prepare barely drink for us." Jadi he got down dan prepared a barley liquid meal for him. Nabi ﷺ drank that dan kemudian berkata, "When you perceive the night approaching from that side, seseorang observing Saum (puasa) harus break the fast." Dan ia (ﷺ) pointed kepada the east with his hand..

ar:
وعن سلمان بن عامر الضبي الصحابي، رضي الله عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إذا أفطر أحدكم، فليفطر على تمر فإن لم يجد فليفطر على ماء فإنه طهور‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود، والترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن صحيح‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean:
وعن سلمان بن عامر الضبي الصحابي، رضي الله عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: 
"إذا أفطر أحدكم، فليفطر على تمر فإن لم يجد فليفطر على ماء فإنه طهور" ((رواه أبو داود، والترمذي وقال: حديث حسن صحيح)).
isnad_ar: وعن سلمان بن عامر الضبي الصحابي، رضي الله عنه
matn_ar:
عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: 
"إذا أفطر أحدكم، فليفطر على تمر فإن لم يجد فليفطر على ماء فإنه طهور" ((رواه أبو داود، والترمذي وقال: حديث حسن صحيح)).
matn_ar_clean:
عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: 
"إذا أفطر أحدكم، فليفطر على تمر فإن لم يجد فليفطر على ماء فإنه طهور" ((رواه أبو داود، والترمذي وقال: حديث حسن صحيح)).
sunnah_ref_en: Salman bin 'Amir (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: I heard the Prophet (ﷺ) saying, "When one of you breaks his Saum (fasting), let him break it on dates; if he does not have any, break his fast with water for it is pure.".
iwh_en: Salman bin 'Amir (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that i heard the Prophet ﷺ saying, "When one of you breaks his Saum (fasting), let him break it on dates; if he does not have any, break his fast with water for it is pure.".
iwh_id: Salman bin 'Amir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa i heard Nabi ﷺ saying, "When one of you breaks his Saum (fasting), let him break it on dates; if he does not have any, break his fast with water for it is pure.".

ar: وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يفطر قبل أن يصلي على رطبات، فإن لم تكن رطبات فتميرات فإن لم تكن تميرات حسا حسوات من ماء‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود والترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يفطر قبل أن يصلي على رطبات، فإن لم تكن رطبات فتميرات فإن لم تكن تميرات حسا حسوات من ماء. ((رواه أبو داود والترمذي وقال: حديث حسن)).
isnad_ar: وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يفطر قبل أن يصلي على رطبات
matn_ar: فإن لم تكن رطبات فتميرات فإن لم تكن تميرات حسا حسوات من ماء. ((رواه أبو داود والترمذي وقال: حديث حسن)).
matn_ar_clean: فإن لم تكن رطبات فتميرات فإن لم تكن تميرات حسا حسوات من ماء. ((رواه أبو داود والترمذي وقال: حديث حسن)).
sunnah_ref_en: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) used to break his Saum (fasting) before performing Maghrib prayer with three fresh date-fruits; if there were no fresh date- fruits, he will eat three dry dates; and if there were no dry date- fruits; he would take three draughts of water..
iwh_en: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to break his Saum (fasting) before performing Maghrib prayer with three fresh date-fruits; if there were no fresh date- fruits, he will eat three dry dates; and if there were no dry date- fruits; he would take three draughts of water..
iwh_id: Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa break his Saum (puasa) sebelum performing Maghrib shalat with three fresh date-fruits; if there were no fresh date- fruits, he will eat three dry dates; dan if there were no dry date- fruits; ia mengambil three draughts of water..

ar:
عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ ‏
"‏إذا كان يوم صوم أحدكم فلا يرفث ولا يصخب، فإن سابه أحد أو قاتله، فليقل‏:‏ إني صائم‏"‏
ar_clean:

"إذا كان يوم صوم أحدكم فلا يرفث ولا يصخب، فإن سابه أحد أو قاتله، فليقل: إني صائم"
isnad_ar: عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال:

matn_ar_clean:
قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: 
"إذا كان يوم صوم أحدكم فلا يرفث ولا يصخب، فإن سابه أحد أو قاتله، فليقل: إني صائم"
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "When any one of you is observing Saum (fasting) on a day, he should neither indulge in obscene language nor should he raise the voice; and if anyone reviles him or tries to quarrel with him he should say: 'I am observing fast."'.
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "When any one of you is observing Saum (fasting) on a day, he should neither indulge in obscene language nor should he raise the voice; and if anyone reviles him or tries to quarrel with him he should say: 'I am observing fast."'.
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "When any one of you is observing Saum (fasting) on a day, he should neither indulge in obscene language dan tidak should he raise the voice; dan if anyone reviles him or tries to quarrel with him he should say: 'I am observing fast."'.

ar:
وعنه قال‏:‏ قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ ‏
"‏ من لم يدع قول الزور والعمل به فليس لله حاجة في أن يدع طعامه وشرابه‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean:
وعنه قال: قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم: 
" من لم يدع قول الزور والعمل به فليس لله حاجة في أن يدع طعامه وشرابه" ((رواه البخاري)).
isnad_ar: وعنه قال:

قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم: 
" من لم يدع قول الزور والعمل به فليس لله حاجة في أن يدع طعامه وشرابه" ((رواه البخاري)).
matn_ar_clean:
قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم: 
" من لم يدع قول الزور والعمل به فليس لله حاجة في أن يدع طعامه وشرابه" ((رواه البخاري)).
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "If one does not eschew lies and false conduct, Allah has no need that he should abstain from his food and his drink.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said, "If one does not eschew lies and false conduct, Allah has no need that he should abstain from his food and his drink.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata, "If one does not eschew lies dan false conduct, Allah has no need that he should abstain from his food dan his drink.".

ar:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إذا نسي أحدكم فأكل أو شرب فليتم صومه فإنما أطعمه الله وسقاه‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: 
"إذا نسي أحدكم فأكل أو شرب فليتم صومه فإنما أطعمه الله وسقاه" ((متفق عليه))
isnad_ar: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال:
matn_ar: "إذا نسي أحدكم فأكل أو شرب فليتم صومه فإنما أطعمه الله وسقاه" ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar_clean: "إذا نسي أحدكم فأكل أو شرب فليتم صومه فإنما أطعمه الله وسقاه" ((متفق عليه))
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "If any one of you forgetfully eats or drinks (while observing fasting) he should complete his Saum (fasting), for Allah has fed him and given him to drink.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said, "If any one of you forgetfully eats or drinks (while observing fasting) he should complete his Saum (fasting), for Allah has fed him and given him to drink.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata, "If any one of you forgetfully eats or drinks (while observing puasa) he should complete his Saum (puasa), for Allah has fed him dan given him to drink.".

ar: وعن لقيط بن صبرة رضي الله عنه قال قلت يا رسول الله أخبرني عن الوضوء‏؟‏ قال‏"‏ ‏"‏أسبغ الوضوء، وخلل بين الأصابع، وبالغ في الاستنشاق، إلا أن تكون صائمًا‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبوداود، والترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن صحيح‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن لقيط بن صبرة رضي الله عنه قال قلت يا رسول الله أخبرني عن الوضوء؟ قال" "أسبغ الوضوء، وخلل بين الأصابع، وبالغ في الاستنشاق، إلا أن تكون صائمًا" ((رواه أبوداود، والترمذي وقال: حديث حسن صحيح)).
isnad_ar: وعن لقيط بن صبرة رضي الله عنه قال قلت يا رسول الله أخبرني عن الوضوء؟ قال" "أسبغ الوضوء
matn_ar: وخلل بين الأصابع، وبالغ في الاستنشاق، إلا أن تكون صائمًا" ((رواه أبوداود، والترمذي وقال: حديث حسن صحيح)).
matn_ar_clean: وخلل بين الأصابع، وبالغ في الاستنشاق، إلا أن تكون صائما" ((رواه أبوداود، والترمذي وقال: حديث حسن صحيح)).
sunnah_ref_en: Laqit bin Sabirah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: I requested the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) to talk to me about ablution. He said, "Perform the Wudu' well (by washing those parts of the body, such as the face, hands and feet beyond what is required, like washing the hands up to the upper-arm instead of the elbow). Cleanse the base of your fingers and sniff water deep into the nose except when you are observing fast.".
iwh_en: Laqit bin Sabirah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that i requested the Messenger of Allah ﷺ to talk to me about ablution. He said, "Perform the Wudu' well (by washing those parts of the body, such as the face, hands and feet beyond what is required, like washing the hands up to the upper-arm instead of the elbow). Cleanse the base of your fingers and sniff water deep into the nose except when you are observing fast.".
iwh_id: Laqit bin Sabirah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa i requested Rasulullah ﷺ to talk to me tentang ablution. He bersabda, "Perform the Wudu' well (by washing those parts of the body, such as the face, hands dan feet beyond what is required, like washing the hands up to the upper-arm instead of the elbow). Cleanse the base of your fingers dan sniff water deep into the nose except when you are observing fast.".

ar: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يدركه الفجر وهو جنب من أهله ثم يغتسل ويصوم ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت: كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يدركه الفجر وهو جنب من أهله ثم يغتسل ويصوم ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يدركه الفجر وهو جنب من أهله ثم يغتسل ويصوم ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
matn_ar_clean: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يدركه الفجر وهو جنب من أهله ثم يغتسل ويصوم ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
sunnah_ref_en: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) would wake up at Fajr time in a state of Janabah; so he would take bath before dawn and observe fasting..
iwh_en: 'Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) reported: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would wake up at Fajr time in a state of Janabah; so he would take bath before dawn and observe fasting..
iwh_id:
'Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) meriwayatkan:
Rasulullah ﷺ would wake up at Subuh time di state of Janabah; jadi ia mengambil mandi sebelum dawn dan observe puasa..

ar: وعن عائشة وأم سلمة رضي الله عنهما قالتا‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يصبح جنبًا من غير حلم ثم يصوم‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean: وعن عائشة وأم سلمة رضي الله عنهما قالتا: كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يصبح جنبًا من غير حلم ثم يصوم. ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar: وعن عائشة وأم سلمة رضي الله عنهما قالتا‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يصبح جنبًا من غير حلم ثم يصوم‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
matn_ar_clean: وعن عائشة وأم سلمة رضي الله عنهما قالتا‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يصبح جنبا من غير حلم ثم يصوم‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
sunnah_ref_en: 'Aishah, and Umm Salamah (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) would wake during Ramadan (fasting) in a state of major impurity without a wet dream, but on account of sexual intercourse and he would take a bath before dawn..
iwh_en: 'Aishah, and Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with them) reported: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would wake during Ramadan (fasting) in a state of major impurity without a wet dream, but on account of sexual intercourse and he would take a bath before dawn..
iwh_id:
'Aishah, and Umm Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anhum) meriwayatkan:
Rasulullah ﷺ would wake selama Ramadan (puasa) di state of major impurity tanpa a wet dream, namun on account of hubungan badan dan ia mengambil a mandi sebelum dawn..

ar:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ ‏
"‏أفضل الصيام بعد رمضان‏:‏ شهر الله المحرم، وأفضل الصلاة بعد الفريضة‏:‏ صلاة الليل‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: 
"أفضل الصيام بعد رمضان: شهر الله المحرم، وأفضل الصلاة بعد الفريضة: صلاة الليل" ((رواه مسلم)).
isnad_ar: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم:
matn_ar: "أفضل الصيام بعد رمضان: شهر الله المحرم، وأفضل الصلاة بعد الفريضة: صلاة الليل" ((رواه مسلم)).
matn_ar_clean: "أفضل الصيام بعد رمضان: شهر الله المحرم، وأفضل الصلاة بعد الفريضة: صلاة الليل" ((رواه مسلم)).
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The best month for observing Saum (fasting) next after Ramadan is the month of Allah, the Muharram; and the best Salat (prayer) next after the prescribed Salat is Salat at night (Tahajjud prayers).".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The best month for observing Saum (fasting) next after Ramadan is the month of Allah, the Muharram; and the best Salat (prayer) next after the prescribed Salat is Salat at night (Tahajjud prayers).".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "The best month for observing Saum (fasting) next setelah Ramadan is the month of Allah, the Muharram; dan the best Salat (prayer) next setelah the prescribed Salat is Salat at night (Tahajjud prayers).".

ar: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت لم يكن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم يصوم من شهر أكثر من شعبان فإنه كان يصوم شعبان كله وفي رواية‏:‏ كان يصوم شعبان إلا قليلا‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت لم يكن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم يصوم من شهر أكثر من شعبان فإنه كان يصوم شعبان كله وفي رواية: كان يصوم شعبان إلا قليلا. ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت لم يكن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم يصوم من شهر أكثر من شعبان فإنه كان يصوم شعبان كله وفي رواية‏:‏ كان يصوم شعبان إلا قليلا‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
matn_ar_clean: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت لم يكن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم يصوم من شهر أكثر من شعبان فإنه كان يصوم شعبان كله وفي رواية‏:‏ كان يصوم شعبان إلا قليلا‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
sunnah_ref_en: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) reported: The Prophet (ﷺ) did not observe voluntary Saum (fasting) so frequently during any other month as he did during Sha'ban. He observed Saum throughout the month of Sha'ban.Another narration is: He (ﷺ) observed Saum during the whole month of Sha'ban except a few days..
iwh_en: 'Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) reported: the Prophet ﷺ did not observe voluntary Saum (fasting) so frequently during any other month as he did during Sha'ban. He observed Saum throughout the month of Sha'ban.Another narration is: He (ﷺ) observed Saum during the whole month of Sha'ban except a few days..
iwh_id:
'Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) meriwayatkan:
Nabi ﷺ tidak observe voluntary Saum (puasa) jadi frequently selama any other month as he did selama Sha'ban. He observed Saum throughout the month of Sha'ban.Another narration is: He (ﷺ) observed Saum selama the whole month of Sha'ban except a few days..

ar: وعن مجيبة الباهلية عن أبيها أو عمها، أنه أتى رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ثم انطلق فأتاه بعد سنة وقد تغيرت حاله وهيئته، فقال‏:‏ يا رسول الله أما تعرفني‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏ومن أنت‏؟‏‏"‏ قال‏:‏ أنا الباهلي الذي جئتك عام الأول‏.‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏فما غيرك، وقد كنت حسن الهيئة‏؟‏‏"‏ قال‏:‏ ما أكلت طعامًا منذ فارقتك إلا بليل‏.‏ فقال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏عذبت نفسك‏!‏‏"‏ ثم قال‏:‏ ‏"‏صم شهر الصبر، ويومًا من كل شهر‏"‏ قال‏:‏ زدني، فإن بي قوة، قال‏:‏ ‏"‏ صم يومين‏"‏ قال‏:‏ زذني، قال‏:‏ ‏"‏صم ثلاثة أيام‏"‏ قال‏:‏ زدني‏.‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏صم من الحرم واترك، صم من الحرم واترك، صم من الحرم واترك‏"‏ وقال بأصابعه الثلاث فضمها، ثم أرسلها‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود‏.‏ ‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

((رواه أبو داود. )).

sunnah_ref_en: Reported Mujibah Al-Bahiliyah on the authority of her father or uncle that he visited the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) once and then went to see him again after a year. His appearance had totally changed. He asked the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) if he had recognized him. The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) asked, "Who are you?" He replied: "I am Al- Bahili who visited you last year." The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "You were quite handsome, what has changed your appearance so much?" He replied, "Since my departure from here, I have not eaten anything except at night." The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) remarked, "You have put yourself to torture. Observe Saum (fasting) during the Month of Patience (i.e., Ramadan) and fast one day from each month." He submitted, "Permit me to observe more voluntary fasts because I have capacity to do so." The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Then observe fasts for two days in every month." He said, "Permit me to observe more." The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Observe fasts on three days in every month." He requested that he should be allowed to observe more fasts. The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Fast three days during the sacred months and omit fasting for three days alternately." He (ﷺ) joined his three fingers together and left them apart while repeating this sentence thrice..
iwh_en: Reported Mujibah Al-Bahiliyah on the authority of her father or uncle that he visited the Messenger of Allah ﷺ once and then went to see him again after a year. His appearance had totally changed. He asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ if he had recognized him. the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked, "Who are you?" He replied: "I am Al- Bahili who visited you last year." the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "You were quite handsome, what has changed your appearance so much?" He replied, "Since my departure from here, I have not eaten anything except at night." the Messenger of Allah ﷺ remarked, "You have put yourself to torture. Observe Saum (fasting) during the Month of Patience (i.e., Ramadan) and fast one day from each month." He submitted, "Permit me to observe more voluntary fasts because I have capacity to do so." the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Then observe fasts for two days in every month." He said, "Permit me to observe more." the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Observe fasts on three days in every month." He requested that he should be allowed to observe more fasts. the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Fast three days during the sacred months and omit fasting for three days alternately." He (ﷺ) joined his three fingers together and left them apart while repeating this sentence thrice..
iwh_id: Mujibah Al-Bahiliyah meriwayatkan dari ayah atau pamannya bahwa ia pernah mengunjungi Rasulullah ﷺ, lalu kembali menemuinya setelah setahun. Penampilan fisiknya telah berubah drastis. Ia berkata, "Wahai Rasulullah, apakah engkau mengenaliku?" Beliau bertanya, "Siapa kamu?" Ia menjawab, "Saya Al-Bahili yang datang kepadamu tahun lalu." Beliau bertanya, "Apa yang membuatmu berubah? Dulu kamu terlihat sehat." Ia menjawab, "Saya tidak makan kecuali di malam hari sejak meninggalkanmu." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Mengapa kamu menyiksa dirimu? Berpuasalah di bulan sabar (Ramadhan) dan sehari setiap bulannya." Ia berkata, "Tambahkan untukku, karena saya mampu melakukannya." Beliau bersabda, "Berpuasalah dua hari." Ia berkata, "Tambahkan lagi." Beliau bersabda, "Berpuasalah tiga hari." Ia berkata, "Tambahkan lagi." Beliau bersabda, "Berpuasalah dari bulan-bulan haram (Rajab, Dzulqa'dah, Dzulhijjah, dan Muharram), tinggalkan, berpuasalah dari bulan-bulan haram, tinggalkan, berpuasalah dari bulan-bulan haram, tinggalkan." Beliau mengisyaratkan dengan ketiga jarinya, menggenggam lalu melepaskannya."

ar: وعن ابن عباس رضي الله عنهما قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ ‏"‏ ما من أيام العمل الصالح فيها أحب إلى الله من هذه الأيام‏"‏ يعني أيام العشر، قالوا‏:‏ يا رسول الله ولا الجهاد في سبيل الله‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏ولا الجهاد في سبيل الله، إلا رجل خرج بنفسه، وماله فلم يرجع من ذلك بشيء‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
